command:
start=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(int(time.time()*1000))
PY
)
bun test ./src/lib/partial-review-formatter.test.ts ./src/lib/review-utils.test.ts ./src/handlers/review.test.ts
status=$?
end=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(int(time.time()*1000))
PY
)
echo "__EXIT_CODE__=$status"
echo "__DURATION_MS__=$((end-start))"
exit $status
